race.comment: VEGAS ON FIRE (7) is a model of consistency who probably needs to be forgiven last start when unable to lead because she draws to take control here. INFER (1) comes off a win in the Drought Breaker, form that generally needs to be treated with caution, but that was his first start for Toby Lake and this looks a suitable next step. BOMERTON (5) ran on strongly but just failed to pick up the winner last start over 1600m at Narrandera. Steps up a level but he is capable of another big run from a good draw. WATOTO (4) is yet to strike this campaign but has good early dash and could prove tricky to catch if left alone in front.
